Package logic.item.armor

package logic.item.armor
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    HardstoneArmor
    Tier-2 craftable armor made from Normal Stone and Hard Stone.
    IronArmor
    Tier-3 craftable armor made from Normal Stone and Iron.
    MithrilArmor
    Tier-5 craftable armor made from Platinum and Mithril.
    PlatinumArmor
    Tier-4 craftable armor made from Iron and Platinum.
    StoneArmor
    Tier-1 craftable armor made from Normal Stone.
    VibraniumArmor
    Tier-6 (top-tier) craftable armor made from Mithril and Vibranium.
